title: Full Committee Hearing: Department of the Navy Fiscal Year 2026 Budget Request
description:
Purpose:
To receive testimony from the Secretary of the Navy, Acting Chief of Naval Operations, and the Commandant of the Marine Corps concerning the fiscal year (FY) 2026 budget request for the Department of the Navy.
text:
Purpose: To receive testimony from the Secretary of the Navy, Acting Chief of Naval Operations, and the Commandant of the Marine Corps concerning the fiscal year (FY) 2026 budget request for the Department of the Navy.
Chairman Rogers' Opening Statement
Witnesses:
The Honorable John C. Phelan
Secretary of the Navy
Department of the Navy
Admiral James W. Kilby
Acting Chief of Naval Operations
United States Navy
General Eric M. Smith
Commandant
United States Marine Corps
